Sector Overview

Our Expertise

Warehouse Conveyors

PLC-controlled conveyor and sortation systems for distribution centres, e-commerce fulfilment and logistics hubs.

Airport Baggage Handling

Complex baggage handling system automation including check-in, screening, sortation and reclaim control.

ASRS Integration

Automated storage and retrieval system control and integration with WMS, ERP and warehouse management software.

AGV & AMR Integration

Automated guided vehicle and autonomous mobile robot integration with conveyor and WMS systems.
